name: input
description: A styled text input with smooth focus transitions, shadow effects, and full HTML input compatibility.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty

props.name: onChange
props.description: Change handler for controlled usage: (e: ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to merge with the component styles

examples.title: File upload
examples.description: File input with styled file button

examples.title: With label
examples.description: Input paired with a Label component

ai.whenToUse: Use for single-line text input: names, emails, passwords, search, numbers. Always pair with a Label for accessibility.
ai.whenNotToUse: Don't use for multi-line text (use Textarea). Don't use for selection from predefined options (use Select). Don't use for rich text editing.
commonMistakes: Missing associated Label element for accessibility
Not providing placeholder text for context
ai.accessibilityNotes: Always pair with a Label using htmlFor/id. Consider aria-describedby for helper text or error messages.
